events.name: TILE_CLICK
events.description: Emits UI:{tileClickEvent} with { x, y } on tile click

events.name: UNIT_CLICK
events.description: Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click

events.name: HOLE_IN
events.description: Emits when ball reaches the hole

events.name: NEXT_HOLE
events.description: Emits to advance to the next hole
